mapper.select: SELECT * FROM erp_quotations ORDER BY quote_date DESC, created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM erp_quotation_items WHERE quotation_id = #{quotationId}::uuid ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO erp_quotations ( id, quotation_no, title, quote_date, valid_date, supplier_reg_no, supplier_name, supplier_ceo, supplier_address, supplier_biz_type, supplier_biz_item, customer_name, customer_ceo, total_supply_value, total_tax_value, total_amount, remarks, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}::uuid, #{quotationNo}, #{title}, #{quoteDate}::date, #{validDate}::date, #{supplierRegNo}, #{supplierName}, #{supplierCeo}, #{supplierAddress}, #{supplierBizType}, #{supplierBizItem}, #{customerName}, #{customerCeo}, #{totalSupplyValue}, #{totalTaxValue}, #{totalAmount}, #{remarks}, #{status}, #{createdBy}::uuid, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE erp_quotations SET title = #{title}, quote_date = #{quoteDate}::date, valid_date = #{validDate}::date, supplier_reg_no = #{supplierRegNo}, supplier_name = #{supplierName}, supplier_ceo = #{supplierCeo}, supplier_address = #{supplierAddress}, supplier_biz_type = #{supplierBizType}, supplier_biz_item = #{supplierBizItem}, customer_name = #{customerName}, customer_ceo = #{customerCeo}, total_supply_value = #{totalSupplyValue}, total_tax_value = #{totalTaxValue}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, remarks = #{remarks}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}::uuid
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM erp_quotations WHERE quote_date = #{quoteDate}::date
